reasoning: Patch derived from muruvetg/from-simulation-goals-to-parameters output for BPIC2012. Two suggestions were simulatable: (1) reduce call-back activity duration by 30% modelling improved call scripts and training, (7) reduce validation activity duration by 25% modelling faster decision processing. Suggestions 2,3,4,5,6,8 describe policy limits, training hours, workload indices, schedule optimisation and cancellation rate targets — none map to concrete Prosimos parameters without additional assumptions.

modifications.proposed_value: 0.170 hours (30% reduction per suggestion 1: improved call scripts and training reduce call-back time from 10 to 7 minutes)
modifications.rationale: Suggestion 1 targets a 30% reduction in time per call-back via better call scripts and training. Applying this to the mean activity duration models faster call-back processing.
modifications.evidence_source: Base repo suggestion 1: reduce average call-back duration from 10 minutes to 7 minutes via improved call scripts or training
modifications.feasibility_assumptions: Call script improvements and training reduce mean handling time by 30%
modifications.intervention: Reduce W_Nabellen offertes mean duration by 30%
modifications.mechanism_rationale: Shorter service time at the most frequent call-back activity reduces queue build-up and overall cycle time

modifications.proposed_value: 0.164 hours (30% reduction per suggestion 1: same call script and training improvement applies to incomplete dossier calls)
modifications.rationale: The same call-back improvement from suggestion 1 applies to incomplete dossier follow-ups, which are structurally identical call-back activities.
modifications.evidence_source: Base repo suggestion 1: reduce call-back duration by 30% via improved call scripts and training
modifications.feasibility_assumptions: Same call script improvements apply to all call-back type activities
modifications.intervention: Reduce W_Nabellen incomplete dossiers mean duration by 30%
modifications.mechanism_rationale: Faster incomplete dossier follow-ups reduce idle time waiting for customer responses

modifications.proposed_value: 1.166 hours (25% reduction per suggestion 7: target 15 days average decision time vs current 20 days)
modifications.rationale: Suggestion 7 targets a 25% reduction in average time to final decision (20 days to 15 days). Reducing the validation activity duration by 25% directly models faster decision processing.
modifications.evidence_source: Base repo suggestion 7: reduce average days to final decision from 20 to 15 days
modifications.feasibility_assumptions: Process improvements and enhanced decision tools enable 25% faster validation
modifications.intervention: Reduce W_Valideren aanvraag mean duration by 25%
modifications.mechanism_rationale: Faster validation directly shortens the critical path to final decision

expected_kpi_impacts.reasoning: Reduced durations at call-back and validation activities shorten the critical path
Direct duration reduction at the most frequent call-back activity
Faster activity durations increase throughput indirectly

unresolved_kpis.kpi_name: Wait Before Validation by Lifecycle Transition
unresolved_kpis.explanation: Suggestion 5 targets schedule optimisation but provides no concrete resource count or calendar changes that can be encoded in Prosimos

warnings: Suggestions 2 (call-back round limits), 3 (decision adherence rate), 4 (training hours), 5 (schedule optimisation), 6 (workload balance index), and 8 (cancellation rate) describe business policies and KPI targets with no direct Prosimos parameter equivalent.
Duration reductions are applied to representative resources. The apply_patch merger propagates changes to all resources for each activity.
